info.title: Gittensory API
info.description: Backend API for Gittensory advisory checks and Gittensor repository context.

GittensoryBearer.description: Static API/MCP token, GitHub device-flow Gittensory session token, or extension-scoped Gittensory session token where supported. GitHub personal access tokens are not accepted.

GittensorySessionCookie.name: gittensory_session
GittensorySessionCookie.description: HttpOnly browser session cookie set by GitHub web OAuth.

200.description: Service health
Public-safe API and MCP compatibility metadata
Public-safe homepage stats: lifetime PRs handled/merged/closed, gate + slop blocks, and reversal-grounded accuracy. Aggregate counts only.
Public GitHub repository stars/forks for the website chrome; only JSONbored/gittensory is accepted.
Public per-repo review-quality metrics: gate false-positive rates, merge-vs-close ratio, and weekly trend. Aggregate counts only; opt-in via publicQualityMetrics.

404.description: Repo is unknown/private/uninstalled or has not opted in

503.description: Public quality metrics are temporarily unavailable

200.description: Latest Gittensor registry snapshot
Diff between latest registry snapshots
Latest private scoring model snapshot
Upstream Gittensor source/ruleset drift status
Latest normalized upstream Gittensor ruleset snapshot

404.description: No upstream ruleset snapshot has been built yet

200.description: Open and historical upstream drift reports
Private scoring preview artifact
Repository and installation sync status
Operational readiness summary for hosted API, signal fidelity, and public-review preparation
GitHub App installations and health
GitHub App installation health
GitHub App installation repair diagnostics
Refreshed GitHub App installation repair diagnostics
Opt-in notification model and PWA-readiness metadata for control-panel routes

403.description: Role does not allow control-panel notification model access

200.description: Known repositories
Repository detail
Canonical repository intelligence bundle
Cached or computed issue quality report for the repo

404.description: Repo is unknown or has no issue-quality coverage yet

200.description: Cached or freshly-computed per-repo accepted/rejected PR outcome patterns with freshness envelope and explicit evidence-completeness

404.description: Repo is unknown or has no outcome-pattern coverage yet

200.description: Gittensor registration readiness signal for repo owners
Private Gittensor config recommendation for repo owners
Repo focus manifest and compiled policy for maintainers
Persist API-backed focus manifest for a repo
Refresh the persisted focus manifest cache from the repo file

Maintainer-scoped agent audit feed (#784): executed actions + approval-queue decisions, newest first, public-safe action posture only. Supports ?since=ISO-8601&limit=1-200. ?pull=N opts into the unfiltered sibling query: every audit_events row for that one PR's targetKey (no eventType restriction), still maintainer-gated and detail-sanitized the same way.

400.description: Malformed since (not ISO-8601), limit (not an integer in 1-200), or pull (not a positive integer)

200.description: Private self-dogfood registration pack for the Gittensory repo

403.description: Insufficient role for maintainer-only self-dogfood report

200.description: Private self-dogfood registration pack when repo matches configured Gittensory target

403.description: Insufficient role or repo is not the configured self-dogfood target

200.description: Preview-only repo onboarding pack for accepted repositories

404.description: Repository is not accepted or preview unavailable

200.description: Generate maintainer-reviewed contributor issue drafts from repo policy (dry-run by default)

400.description: Invalid request or explicit create without dryRun false

200.description: Gittensory repository automation settings
Maintainer dry-run preview of the public surface decision for a sample PR (no GitHub mutation)
PR-specific maintainer review packet
Private PR reviewability score and maintainer action
Contributor evidence profile
Canonical private contributor decision pack. May carry freshness 'stale' or 'rebuilding' when a background rebuild is in progress.

202.description: Decision pack snapshot is missing; a background rebuild has been requested

200.description: Contributor open-PR monitor with classifications and public-safe next-step packets from cached metadata.
Repo-specific contributor decision from decision pack. May carry freshness 'stale' or 'rebuilding'.

202.description: Decision pack snapshot is missing; a background rebuild has been requested

200.description: Submission preflight result
Local diff preflight result
Private local branch analysis for MCP clients

parameters.description: GitHub login that owns the agent runs.
parameters.name: actorLogin

parameters.description: Maximum run bundles to return, clamped from 1 to 100.
parameters.name: limit

Bounty lifecycle transition history

parameters.description: Report variant. Operator reports require the operator app role.
parameters.name: variant

parameters.description: Report window in days, clamped from 1 to 31.
parameters.name: days

parameters.description: Response format. Omit or use json for the structured report; use markdown for copy-ready text.
parameters.name: format

200.description: Weekly value report as structured JSON or copy-ready Markdown

schema.example:
# Weekly Gittensory value report

## Adoption metrics
- Active users: 4

403.description: Insufficient app role for requested report variant

parameters.description: Maximum rows to return, clamped from 1 to 100.
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Optional repository filter. Browser sessions must have control-panel access to this repo.
